daily_script:
(Upbeat, slightly pulsing intro music fades quickly)

Alright, Future Millionaires, let’s check the pulse! Today felt like two different markets, right? SPY, our trusty S&P 500, dipped just a hair, down 0.16%. QQQ, the Nasdaq, nudged up 0.1%. So, basically, our broader market cruise control is still on. Nothing wild there—just steady accumulation vibes.

BUT THEN! Did you see XRP? Whoa! Up a mind-blowing 141% today! If you’ve been patiently holding that bag, huge congrats! That’s what long-term plays are all about.

So, a mixed bag for the big guys, but a rocket ship for crypto. The daily ebb and flow for our bags!

Want to track this stress-free? Hit the pinned link for our free market terminal.
